entry.title: IDC 36C10G19D0038 (P00053) awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: COMMUNITY CARE NETWORK REGION 4 - P00053 ADDING IN PACIFIC ISLANDS DELIVERABLES TO R4 CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
